series_metadata.series_description: These are authorizations to the Auditor of State to issue a warrant in payment of the Board of Tax Appeals obligations (including travel) upon certification by the Director of Finance that sufficient uncommitted appropriations are available for the purpose.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Current year plus 3 years past retained in Department. 4 years past and older sent to State Records Center for retention for 4 years then destroyed (or until audited), Paper: Wastepaper
